Title: Register a patient with valid given and family name
Preconditions: Logged in as Registration Clerk at a session location; on the Register a Patient screen
Test_Steps: 1. Enter a valid given name | 2. Enter a valid family name | 3. Click Next | 4. Select gender | 5. Enter birthdate | 6. Enter an address line | 7. Click Confirm
Expected_Result: Patient is created, a unique Patient ID is generated, and the patient dashboard shows the entered name with a created-record confirmation

Title: Register a patient with given, middle and family name
Preconditions: Logged in as Registration Clerk; on the Register a Patient name step
Test_Steps: 1. Enter given name | 2. Enter middle name | 3. Enter family name | 4. Proceed through gender, birthdate, address steps | 5. Click Confirm
Test_Data: Given=Maria; Middle=Elena; Family=Garcia; Gender=Female; DOB=03-Mar-1985; City=Madrid
Expected_Result: Patient is saved and the full name including middle name is displayed on the patient header

Title: Reject registration when given name is blank
